owner: Inner Cosmos Psychology Capability Working Group

description.zh-CN: 看见两个选择各自在保护什么，不替你决定答案。
description.en-SG: See what each option protects without deciding for you.

evidence: Schwartz 1992, Universals in the Content and Structure of Values
Self-Determination Theory, Basic Psychological Needs Theory

limitations.zh-CN: 它帮助澄清优先级，不测量固定人格，也不提供法律、财务或医疗决策。
limitations.en-SG: It clarifies priorities; it does not measure a fixed personality or provide legal, financial or medical advice.
